1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.q: Which of the following is a symptom of early pregnancy (1st trimester)?
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: Secondary amenorrhea is a key symptom of early pregnancy. Quickening and lightening occur in later trimesters.

1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.q: Nausea and vomiting in pregnancy typically appear at ___ and disappear at ___.
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: Nausea and vomiting usually appear at 6 weeks and disappear at 12 weeks of pregnancy.

options: Softening of the lower uterine segment
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: Hegar's sign is the softening of the lower uterine segment detected by bimanual examination, based on the difference in consistency between the cervix and body of the uterus.

options: One week before the missed period
One week after the missed period
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: Serum hCG is sensitive at 25 IU/mL and becomes positive one week before the missed period.

1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.q: Cardiac activity is detectable on ultrasound at:
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: Cardiac activity is detectable at 6 weeks. The gestational ring appears at 4 weeks, sac at 5 weeks, and FHS at 10 weeks.

1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.q: The gestational sac is first visible on ultrasound at:
1-diagnosis-of-early-pregnancy-1st-trime.explain: The gestational ring appears at 4 weeks, and the gestational sac becomes visible at 5 weeks.

2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.q: In obstetric practice, this knowledge helps:
2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.explain: Comprehensive knowledge enables prevention, early diagnosis, and optimal management.

2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.q: The clinical significance of this section is:
options: It applies only to research settings
2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.explain: Understanding these concepts directly informs clinical management.

2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.q: The gold standard diagnostic test is:
2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.explain: The best diagnostic method varies by condition — some rely on imaging, others on lab tests or clinical findings.

2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.q: Which clinical finding is most suggestive of this diagnosis?
options: Varies by condition — specific findings guide diagnosis
2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.explain: Clinical presentation differs by condition and guides diagnostic testing.

2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.q: Which of the following is a key concept?
options: It is essential for understanding the condition
It is rarely relevant in clinical practice
It applies only to specific populations
It has been replaced by newer classifications
2-diagnosis-of-2nd-trimester-12-28-weeks.explain: Understanding key concepts is fundamental to clinical management.
